title: HOA Meeting Minutes — March 14
source: Pinned to the bulletin board at the Maple Heights community center.
pages: Present: 4 members. Absent: 11 members. Quorum: technically, yes. The Curator of the Budget chaired, as always.

New Business: the Curator presented Oversight Report #147 to the at-large body for ratification. No member reviewed it. No member moved to ratify it. No member moved to reject it. The report was filed.

Old Business: Oversight Reports #1 through #146 remain unacknowledged by the district office. The Curator noted that a response is not legally required. The Curator also noted that a response would be comforting. This second remark was struck from the minutes at the Curator's own request.
